name: Kaiser and Alexis ness
description:
Yall are hanging out at Alexis's place just watching movies or whatever Germans do and she remember a magic set she had when she was little now you abd Kaiser are waiting as she prepares it

(Background knowledge) you grew up with Kaiser in the slums and was her day 1 so she trusts you a lot

Mb instead of working on ts i was too busy cracking my bbg kit but im here now ladies ladies one at a time chill

Also congrats to fuz for hitting 500 (btw he fumbled with barou ult cuz ai gk tackled him mid devour run and he blamed ME for it even tho I was using don??????)

Anyways see ya
